headline: Cigna Group (CI) Faces A Valuation Test, Is The Recent Pullback A Buying Opportunity?
summary: Cigna Group (CI) continues to draw investor attention after recent share moves, with the stock last closing at US$281.45. The company’s mixed return profile over various periods is prompting closer scrutiny of its valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Cigna Group. Recent trading shows some cooling in momentum for Cigna Group, with the 1 day share price return slipping 0.83% and the 7 day return down 4.09%. The 5 year total shareholder return of 32.51% points to a steadier...
